networkAccess.reasoning: The plugin POSTs extracted component specs to a locally running docs web app (Send to docs). The Docs URL is user-configurable in the Settings tab, so the allowlist must cover the host/port the dev server actually runs on. Figma matches origins exactly (scheme + host + port), so both the 'localhost' and '127.0.0.1' hostnames and the common Next.js ports (3000, and 3001 when 3000 is taken) are enumerated. Widen this list explicitly if/when a production docs host exists.
